name: Nordson Corporation
description: Nordson Corporation is an American multinational corporation that designs, manufactures, and markets differentiated products and systems used for the precision dispensing of adhesives, coatings, sealants, biomaterials, polymers, plastics, and other materials. The company's solutions are utilized in a wide variety of consumer and industrial end markets, including packaging, nonwovens, electronics, medical, energy, and transportation. Headquartered in Westlake, Ohio, Nordson operates through a global network of direct operations and support offices in over 35 countries, providing high-quality precision technology and application expertise to manufacturers worldwide.
